title: bupleurum falcatum f. lisae
intro: Bupleurum falcatum f. lisae, a rare variant of the Bupleurum falcatum plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the carrot family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits associated with Bupleurum falcatum f. lisae include reducing stress and anxiety, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting anti-cancer and anti-viral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and balance.
intro_study: According to "Scientific reports", Bupleurum falcatum f. lisae benefits from selenium sources, which significantly improved its morpho-physiological and phytochemical properties, such as increased shoot fresh and dry weight, total alkaloid, essential oil percentage, and antioxidant activity.
